title: Floral Crisp Croatian Pumpkin Stir-fry
description: A floral and crisp post-workout Croatian dish featuring pumpkin as the main ingredient, combined with other aromatic herbs for a healthy twist.
instructions: Slice the pumpkin into thin rounds and remove seeds.
Cut onion into slices, finely chop garlic cloves, and tear rosemary sprigs.
Drizzle olive oil over pumpkin slices, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and place in a baking dish. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
In a skillet, sauté chopped onions and minced garlic until translucent.
Add thyme leaves to the skillet, stir-fry for another minute until fragrant.
Gently mix the baked pumpkin slices into the skillet with onion-garlic-thyme mixture. Add salt and pepper to taste, cook for 2-3 more minutes.
